name: Shubham Sarkar
summary: Machine Learning Engineer with hands-on experience designing and deploying NLP-driven systems for document analysis, semantic search, and intelligent insights. Strong background in text preprocessing, embedding-based retrieval, multimodal learning, and scalable ML pipelines. Proven ability to collaborate across data, product, and infrastructure teams to deliver low-latency, production-ready AI systems using Python, PyTorch/TensorFlow, Docker, and cloud platforms.

experience.title: Machine Learning Engineer
bullets: Enhanced model prediction accuracy by 15% by analyzing agent responses on different rubrics and state scenarios
Transcribed 50+ audio and video files to provide quality training and test data
Evaluated LLM conversations to assess correctness of tool usage, API calls, and reasoning flow

projects.name: Smart Product Pricing Model, Amazon ML Challenge 2025
bullets: Created a NLP and CV pipeline to analyze 150,000 image and text data using transformer-based text encoders and CNN-based image embeddings, integrating them through a fusion neural network for price prediction
Implemented data preprocessing, including text cleaning, tokenization, and streaming image feature extraction with ResNet and CLIP representations to handle large dataset
Applied feature engineering, outlier handling, and SMAPE-based evaluation to optimize prediction accuracy
Built and fine-tuned models using TensorFlow and scikit-learn, accomplished 142 rank out of 50,000 participants

projects.name: Tailorcv.ai
bullets: Built an AI web app that tailors resumes to job descriptions using LLMs and NLP pipelines, improving resume relevance by up to 80%
Designed a Python and FastAPI backend and HTML CSS and Javascript for frontend and deployed on AWS
Got 50+ users within the first week of launch, demonstrating strong early adoption and real-world impact

projects.name: RAG System
bullets: Made a production-ready RAG pipeline integrating semantic vector retrieval with LLM generation to produce context-grounded responses
Engineered multiple chunking strategies and a scalable ingestion, retrieval, generation flow for efficient semantic search and generation
Implemented history-aware and multimodal augmentations, and evaluated retrieval outputs to measure relevance and quality

projects.name: Youtube Sentiment Analysis
bullets: Created an end-to-end YouTube sentiment analysis pipeline processing 10k+ user comments, improving sentiment classification performance through NLP preprocessing (tokenization, lemmatization, stopword removal)
Tracked multiple model experiments using MLflow and DVC, enabling reproducible training and systematic comparison of models built with scikit-learn and NLP libraries
Deployed the pipeline on AWS using Docker and exposed predictions via Flask REST APIs, enabling scalable and reproducible inference

skills: Machine Learning & AI: Supervised & Unsupervised Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, LLM Fine Tuning, Retrieval Augmented Generation(RAG)
Frameworks & Libraries: TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn, Hugging Face, Pandas, NumPy
MLOps & Deployment: Amazon Web Services (AWS), Docker, MLflow, DVC, FastAPI, Flask, Streamlit, CI/CD
Data & Systems: SQL, ETL Pipelines, Linux, AWS, Vector Databases
Programming: Python, C, Javascript, HTML, CSS, Data Structures and Algorithms
achievements: Secured 98.5 percentile in JEE Mains out of 1,400,000 students and 1458 rank in WBJEE
Scored 96% in class 10 to get into one of the best schools in Kolkata. 92% in class 12

bullets: Organized national-level flagship events such as E-Summit 2025 and Hult Prize 2025, achieving 5,000+ registrations and 1,000+ on-campus attendees
Contributed to the establishment of an Incubation Center at Jadavpur University under the Institution's Innovation Council (IIC)
Led planning and execution of Finspire 2025, a national-level finance event with 1,000+ registrations and 500+ on-ground attendees, strengthening the club's national presence
Delivered high-impact trading and investment courses to 100+ students, improving engagement in financial markets
